products.name: SCAR-Pod Family
products.descriptor: Carbon fibre external sensor pods for rapid-mount flexible aircraft installation

evidence.snippet:
If you need a flexible solution that provides your mission with multiple options, Airborne LINX also provides mission systems that can easily attach on & off your aircraft anytime. Our carbon fibre SCAR-Pods house the sensor equipment and can be mounted within a short time.
[SCAR-Pod Family](/en/mission-solutions/scar-pod-family/ "SCAR-Pod Family")

products.name: EO/IR SCAR-Pod
products.descriptor: Carbon fibre pod carrying EO/IR targeting camera and up to 160 kg mission equipment

evidence.snippet:
**EO/IR SCAR-Pod**
Typical Configuration
*   EO/IR/Targeting Camera 10“ up to 20“
*   Can carry up to 160 kg mission equipment
*   Moving Map/Augmented Reality System
*   HD Recorder
*   LOS HD Down/Uplink
*   AIS
*   SIGINT
[Download Datasheet](/media/filer_public/47/a1/47a1b915-cec3-4ace-88ab-f6d13af51172/data_sheet_eoir_scar_pod_26.pdf "Download Datasheet ")

products.name: RADAR SCAR-Pod
products.descriptor: Carbon fibre pod housing AESA radar with SAR, ISAR, GMTI and CCD capabilities

evidence.snippet:
**RADAR SCAR-Pod**
Typical Configuration
It accomodates the latest AESA type non-rotating radars with long-range detection, SAR, ISAR, GMTI and CCD capabilities. With its modular design, the front section can be adapted to house a traditional rotating antenna.
[Download Data Sheet](/media/filer_public/c7/6d/c76dead9-5eac-497b-a973-f26ea13cc933/data_sheet_radar_scar_pod_26.pdf "Download Data Sheet")

products.name: VIDAR SCAR-POD
products.descriptor: Carbon fibre pod housing full ViDAR sensor suite for search and rescue and maritime patrol

evidence.snippet:
**VIDAR SCAR-POD**
Typical Configuration
Accomodates a full ViDAR sensor suite including high-resolution cameras and processing units. The pod offers a wide application range like Search and Rescue, Maritime Patrol and other missions.

**Capabilities**
*   Real-time Detection of Small Objects
*   Autonomous Detection
*   Wide Area Coverage
*   Sensor Cross-Cue
*   Passive Search
*   Up to Sea State 6
*   Reduces Operator Workload

products.name: Airborne LINX
products.descriptor: Airborne mission system integrating all on-board sensors and communications into unified control

evidence.snippet: With our Mission System Airborne LINX, we connect all sensors and communication systems on board any aircraft for maximum mission control.
Airborne LINX is the over-arching system that unites each complex piece of equipment on board an aircraft into an easy-to-operate workplace in the sky.

products.name: Mission Management Unit (MMU)
products.descriptor: Touchscreen human-machine interface for controlling all LINX mission sensors and systems

evidence.snippet: The Human Machine Interface is the Mission Management Unit (MMU), allowing the operator to control the entire LINX architecture on a simple-to-use touchscreen. Embedded either in an ergonomic workstation or on a tablet, the MMU leads the field in simplifying the management of any combination of sensors.

products.name: Workstation
products.descriptor: Ergonomic airborne operator workstation housing the Mission Management Unit touchscreen

evidence.snippet: The Human Machine Interface is the Mission Management Unit (MMU), allowing the operator to control the entire LINX architecture on a simple-to-use touchscreen. Embedded either in an ergonomic workstation or on a tablet, the MMU leads the field in simplifying the management of any combination of sensors.

products.name: Camera Lifts
products.descriptor: Internal and external camera lifting devices for aircraft sensor integration

products.name: Radomes
products.descriptor: In-house manufactured aircraft radomes for sensor and antenna protection

products.name: Brackets
products.descriptor: Carbon fibre mounting brackets for fixed aircraft sensor and equipment integration

products.name: CLEAR VIEW Exhaust Deflector Kit
products.descriptor: EASA STC-certified exhaust deflector eliminating heat distortion in airborne sensor imagery

evidence.snippet: The CLEAR VIEW Exhaust Deflector Kit is a fully certified solution designed to eliminate heat distortion in airborne imaging. Specifically engineered for the Cessna 208B Caravan and certified under EASA STC-AT-188, this innovative system ensures crystal-clear imagery for surveillance, reconnaissance and mapping missions.
*   **Certified & Ready**: EASA STC-AT-188 approved – available as a turnkey installation or certified mod kit for your MRO.

unresolved_questions: Six of eight mission solutions product pages (SCAR-Pod Family, Workstation, Mission Management Unit, Camera Lifts, Brackets, Radomes) were all skipped_class_budget — no dedicated product pages were fetched. Product details (variants, specs, readiness signals) for these six items were inferred solely from mentions on the homepage (resource-0001) and the Airborne LINX overview page (resource-0002). Readiness is unknown for Camera Lifts, Radomes, Brackets, and Workstation for the same reason.
Camera Lifts granularity recorded as 'category' rather than 'family' or 'sku' because no dedicated page was available to determine whether multiple distinct models exist.
The SCAR-Pod Family page was skipped; it is unclear how many pod variants/sizes are offered.
